messages.content: Hello! Can you help me to find a song?
Of course! I'll do my best to help you find a song. Please provide me with any details or lyrics you remember about the song to assist in the search.

So, I remember that this is a pop song with female vocals. I remember that there was a chorus with line that sounds something like "never let you go" or "i will let you go". And, I think i heard this song in game Burnout Paradise, or maybe NFS Hot Pursuit but I'm not sure

Based on the information you provided, the song you are looking for might be "I Will Never Let You Down" by Rita Ora. It is a pop song with female vocals, and the chorus contains the lyrics "I will never let you down." 

Although it is not specifically featured in the games you mentioned, it could still be the song you're looking for as soundtracks can vary in different versions or releases. Give it a listen and see if it matches your memory!
No, that is not the song I'm looking for, but I think it's pretty close. The song I want to find is more fast and energetic than the one you offered

I apologize for the incorrect suggestion. Let's try again! Based on your description of a fast and energetic pop song with female vocals, and considering the possibility of it being in Burnout Paradise or NFS Hot Pursuit, a song that comes to mind is "Days Go By" by Dirty Vegas.

While this song doesn't have the exact lyrics you mentioned, it has a similar vibe and was featured in various racing games. Give it a listen and let me know if it is the song you were searching for!
No, it's not it, again:( I want you to not focus on this games, rather focus on female vocals and words somethin similar in sound to what I mentioned

I apologize for the previous incorrect suggestions. Based on your emphasis on female vocals and a similar sound to the lyrics you mentioned, another song that comes to mind is "I Won't Let You Go" by James Morrison. 

Although not a pop song, it is a heartfelt ballad with a catchy chorus that contains the lyrics "I won't let you go." It was popular during its release and might match the energetic feel you described.

Please give it a listen and let me know if this is the song you were searching for
Again not! The song i want to find contains only female vocals and more happy and life-affirming. Also, I heard it sometime in between 2009 and 2014

I apologize for the previous incorrect suggestions. Given the timeframe of 2009 to 2014 and the description of a happy and life-affirming song with only female vocals, a song that fits that description is "Call Me Maybe" by Carly Rae Jepsen. 

Released in 2011, it was a popular pop song with an energetic and upbeat feel. While it doesn't have the exact lyrics you mentioned, it has a similar vibe and was a chart-topping hit during that time.

Please give it a listen and let me know if this is the song you were searching for!

I don't have to listen to say that it's not the song I want:) I dare to say the song I was looking for is not too popular, certainly not as popular as Call Me Maybe. And, can you provide me a couple of song at one answer, so it will speeds up the search proccess

Apologies for the previous incorrect suggestions. Based on your updated description, here are a couple of songs that might match your criteria:

1. "I Will Never Let You Down" by Rita Ora (2014)
2. "Never Let You Go" by Dash Berlin (2010)

Please give these songs a listen and let me know if either of them is the song you were looking for.
Hmm, second song is pretty simmilar to what I want to find, it's genre and style almost the same. But, again, it MUST have female vocal in the chorus and maybe whole song

I apologize for the confusion. Based on your updated requirements of a song with female vocals in the chorus and potentially throughout the entire song, here are a couple more suggestions:

1. "Good Time" by Owl City ft. Carly Rae Jepsen (2012)
2. "Dancing On My Own" by Robyn (2010)

Please give these songs a listen and let me know if either of them is the song you are looking for!
No, It's not them either

I apologize for the continued difficulty in finding the song you're looking for. To provide a couple more suggestions based on your specific requirements, please try listening to the following songs:

1. "Let You Go" by The Chainsmokers & Great Good Fine Ok (2015)
2. "Faded" by ZHU (2014)

Please let me know if any of these songs match the description and if we're getting closer to finding the song you're searching for.
No, it's sounds like Never Let You Go” by Dash Berlin but with female vocals and it was released before 2015. And it's title not necessary would contain the line i mentioned

I apologize for the difficulty in finding the specific song you're referring to. Here are a couple more songs that have a similar energetic vibe to "Never Let You Go" by Dash Berlin, and feature female vocals:

1. "This Girl" by Kungs vs Cookin' on 3 Burners (2016)
2. "Walking On Air" by Katy Perry (2013)

Please give these songs a listen and let me know if either of them is the one you've been searching for.

Hm, second song sounds close but it's not it. Also the female singer in this song is not so popular singer as Ketty Perry or Carly Rae Jepsen. And give me please a list of suggestions with at least 5 songs

I apologize for not hitting the mark yet. Here's a list of five songs that have energetic vibes, female vocals, and were released between 2009 and 2014:

1. "Bulletproof" by La Roux (2009)
2. "Tik Tok" by Ke$ha (2009)
3. "Call Me Maybe" by Carly Rae Jepsen (2011)
4. "We Found Love" by Rihanna ft. Calvin Harris (2011)
5. "Domino" by Jessie J (2011)

Please give these songs a listen and let me know if any of them match the description or come close to the energetic and happy vibe you're looking for.
Yeah, vibe is similar to what I'm looking for but it should sound faster and no song from the list is a match yet

Apologies for not hitting the mark with the previous suggestions. Here are five more songs that have energetic vibes, female vocals, and were released between 2009 and 2014:

1. "Starships" by Nicki Minaj (2012)
2. "I Love It" by Icona Pop ft. Charli XCX (2012)
3. "Dance Again" by Jennifer Lopez ft. Pitbull (2012)
4. "Party in the USA" by Miley Cyrus (2009)
5. "Only Girl (In the World)" by Rihanna (2010)

Please give these songs a listen and let me know if any of them match the description or come closer to the faster and energetic vibe you're looking for.
The songs you  suggest is very popular, i bet the one I'm looking for have way less, more likely less than a million, views on youtube

I apologize for the previous suggestions not meeting your criteria. Considering your preference for lesser-known songs, here are five songs with energetic vibes and female vocals that were released between 2009 and 2014 and might have fewer views:

1. "Let Me Go" by Avril Lavigne ft. Chad Kroeger (2013)
2. "I Wanna Go" by Britney Spears (2011)
3. "Love Me Like You Do" by Ellie Goulding (2015)
4. "Run the World (Girls)" by Beyoncé (2011)
5. "Electric Daisy Violin" by Lindsey Stirling (2012)

Please give these songs a listen, and let me know if any of them match the description or come closer to the less popular, energetic, and female-vocals criteria you're looking for.
No, they still VERY popular. And none if it contains lines that simillar to “never let you go” or “i will let you go”

I apologize for the continued difficulty in finding the exact song you're looking for. In order to provide more accurate suggestions, could you please provide any additional details or lyrics you remember from the song? This will help narrow down the search and increase the chances of finding the correct song.
Unfortunately this all the lyrics that i remember

I understand. Given the limited information available, it might be challenging to find the exact song you're looking for. However, I will provide a few more suggestions based on the energetic and female-vocal criteria:

1. "Bullet" by Jessie James (2009)
2. "Free" by Natalia Kills (2011)
3. "I Like It Loud" by Carmen Reece (2009)
4. "Beat of My Drum" by Nicola Roberts (2011)
5. "Turn Up the Radio" by Madonna (2012)

While these songs may not specifically match the lyrics you mentioned, they possess energetic qualities and female vocals. Please give them a listen and let me know if any of them are closer to the song you are trying to find.
Hmmm, it's was written in EDM style

Thank you for providing that additional detail. Based on your mention of an EDM style, here are a few more suggestions that fit that genre and have female vocals:

1. "Under Control" by Calvin Harris ft. Alesso and Hurts (2013)
2. "Sweet Nothing" by Calvin Harris ft. Florence Welch (2012)
3. "Clarity" by Zedd ft. Foxes (2012)
4. "Don't You Worry Child" by Swedish House Mafia ft. John Martin (2012)
5. "Reload" by Sebastian Ingrosso, Tommy Trash ft. John Martin (2012)

Please listen to these songs and let me know if any of them are a closer match to the song you are trying to find.
Yeah, it sounds like, but now please exclude male vocals and consider the lyric line i mentioned

I apologize for the previous suggestions not meeting your requirements. Based on your request excluding male vocals and considering the lyric line you mentioned, here's my updated suggestion:

Song: "Never Let You Go"
Artist: Dash Berlin ft. Sarah Howells
Year: 2010

This song matches your description of an EDM-style track with female vocals and the lyric line "never let you go." It is not too popular, and the artist and song align with your initial mention of Dash Berlin's "Never Let You Go."

Please have a listen and let me know if this is the song you were looking for!
No, you've already suggested this song and it also has male vocals

Apologies for suggesting the same song again. I apologize for the confusion. Let me provide another suggestion that matches your criteria:

Song: "Never Gonna Let You Go"
Artist: Esthero
Year: 2010

This song is an electronic/pop track with energetic vibes and female vocals. Although the exact lyric you mentioned is not present, the title and theme of the song align with it.

Please give it a listen and let me know if this is the song you were searching for.
No, it's not EDM, and please suggest at least 5  songs at once

Apologies for the previous suggestions not meeting your criteria. Here are five songs that have an EDM style, energetic vibes, female vocals, and were released between 2009 and 2014:

1. "Cobrastyle" by Robyn (2008)
2. "Alive" by Krewella (2012)
3. "Titanium" by David Guetta ft. Sia (2011)
4. "We Own the Night" by Tiësto ft. Luciana (2011)
5. "Take Over Control" by Afrojack ft. Eva Simons (2010)

Please give these songs a listen, and let me know if any of them match the description or come closer to the energetic EDM song with female vocals you're looking for.
Yeah, this songs is the same style and has female vocals. BUT, they doesn't has the lines i mentioned in they lyrics

Apologies again for not finding the exact song you are looking for. Given your request for the specific lyric lines and an EDM style with female vocals, I understand how challenging it can be to find the exact match. Unfortunately, without further details or additional lyrics, it may be difficult to pinpoint the exact song.

I would recommend trying to search for the soundtrack or in-game music lists specifically from the games Burnout Paradise or NFS Hot Pursuit. These sources might provide a better chance of finding the specific song you are looking for.

If you can recall any other details or lyrics, please feel free to share, and I'll do my best to assist you further.
Okay, big thanks to you anyway

You're welcome! I apologize for not being able to find the exact song you were looking for, but I'm glad I could assist to the best of my ability. If you have any other questions or need assistance in the future, feel free to ask. Good luck in your search for the song!
